title: Usulután Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Usulután with a Z-Score of +4.43. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Usulután is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 14.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 57%, and wind speed is 17.6 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to this critical weather event.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols immediately to mitigate the effects of this heat wave.
